channel.title: Hugrid - Grid Theme For Hugo
channel.description: Recent content on Hugrid - Grid Theme For Hugo

item.title: Donate Non-$
item.description: Hugrid Hugrid (Hugo+grid) is a simple grid theme for Hugo. It’s a kind of boilerplate to perform anyone or anything quickly. Portfolio, collection, bookmarks, contacts and so on. Origin Hugrid is based on Codrops' Thumbnail Grid with Expanding Preview. Demo Demo on themes.gohugo.io Original demo from Codrops Features Responsive design Google Analytics Screenshot Contents Installation Getting started The config file Data file Nearly finished Contributing License Annotations Installation Inside the folder of your new Hugo site run:
